holdings.n: LVMH Moët Hennessy - Louis Vuitton, Société Européenne

holdings.infoBox: BKCI is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 7.25%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 7.14%, TotalEnergies SE at 4.76%, Alimentation Couche-Tard at 4.64%, and Compass Group at 4.62%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon Concentrated International ETF (BKCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund relying heavily on fundamental research to select a narrow basket of stocks, of any market capitalization, from developed markets outside of the US. BKCI was launched on Dec 6, 2021 and is issued by BNY Mellon.
